productDisplayName: Numero Uno Women Canvas Grey Purple Shoe
description: Designed to subtly exude that feminine side of you, this grey pair looks absolutely stylish with the contrast purple piping. So, get retro now and flaunt this canvas pair with much élan.Upper Cotton knit fabric upper with contrast lining for comfort Upper designed to absorb sweat and enable ventilation Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel and protection from impact Cushioned insole with soft padding for ergonomic Fit Outsole High traction rubber outsole for ample comfort and durability Overlaid toe box for extra protection to the forefoot and style shoe careRub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
